ques: In the World News section, find the latest war situations of Middle East and provide a brief summary.
answer: The BBC Middle East (World News) section's latest war coverage centers on four fronts: (1) a US–Israel–Iran war now being wound down through a newly signed US-Iran deal (60-day timeline, IAEA inspections pending, thousands killed); (2) tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, where a cargo ship was hit by an "unknown projectile" near Oman, prompting the UN to pause sailor evacuations and Rubio to warn Iran against tolls; (3) Gaza, where Israeli strikes killed six including an Al Jazeera cameraman and a UN inquiry accuses Israel of genocide (which Israel rejects); and (4) south Lebanon, where Israeli troops killed two alleged Hezbollah operatives amid ceasefire-violation accusations.
